parts.text: [Memory note — memory] [ENV · 2026-05-19] 每日4-6点自学cron已设置：`self-evolution-learning` (job_id: 20b0169c9966)，加载 claude-managed-agents-research skill，轮换研究CMA进化方向(ToolResult→EventLog→Harness→自分析→Token隔离)。Excalidraw PNG导出方案：用Playwright headless Chromium + 分享URL导航，waitForTimeout等待canvas渲染后screenshot。
